category_sources: Official HMMER homepage describes biosequence analysis using profile hidden Markov models.
source_facts.description says HMMER builds profile HMMs and scans sequence databases.
display_name_sources: Official homepage and GitHub repository title use HMMER.
docs_sources: Official Eddy Lab current Userguide.pdf is the project manual.
Official hmmer.org documentation page links the HMMER User's Guide.
repo_sources: Official GitHub repository README says HMMER development is on GitHub and gives clone URL https://github.com/EddyRivasLab/hmmer.
tags_sources: Official homepage describes profile HMM sequence search and alignments.
